topics.label: Installation & psql
topics.description: Install PostgreSQL, use psql CLI, and pgAdmin GUI.

topics.label: Data Types
topics.description: serial, uuid, jsonb, array, hstore, enum, composite types.

topics.label: JSON/JSONB
topics.description: Store and query JSON data. ->, ->>, @>, jsonb_array_elements.

topics.label: Full-Text Search
topics.description: tsvector, tsquery, GIN indexes for text search without external tools.

topics.label: Extensions
topics.description: PostGIS, pg_trgm, uuid-ossp, pgcrypto. Extend PostgreSQL's capabilities.

topics.label: Performance Tuning
topics.description: EXPLAIN ANALYZE, index types (B-tree, GIN, GiST, BRIN), vacuum, and config tuning.
